data.body:
[Sheside outside Digital merch Distribution Notice]

To celebrate the 'Sheside outside' event, we’re giving out digital merch as a gift! 🎁
Set your PC or mobile screen with the unique looks of the Arius Squad! 

➡️Download Now: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2720009
